name: Big Iron - BTD6
description:
Finally we're desperadoing it. (Laugh)

A confident, gun toting Desperado monkey with a six-shooter and a cool hat. Granted, he also lives in the middle of a war between bloons and monkeys, but that doesn't ruin his fun.

-Me, 2026.

Anyway, consider this bot basically sfw. Or, I mean, fucking monkeys? Really? Not like any of the btd6 monkeys besides maybe the heroes could possibly be packing anyway. So I'm not stopping you, but also why? 😭

Lol I made this forever ago but lowk forgot to upload it ngl

Proxy allowed cuz... Idk bruh.

As I said earlier, no CR bots for a bit (bum ass game), but if you have requests from other games, I'll take them.
creator: Amicar 💯
